presentation.title: AI Workbench Local — Policy / Contract Comparison
presentation.subtitle: Executive comparison review of grounded document differences
presentation.author: AI Workbench Local

executive_summary:
**Executive Comparison:**  
The Access Review Evidence Log highlights gaps in evidence archiving that prevent control closure, while the Privileged Account Approval Email establishes a conditional, time-bound access arrangement with strict operational and review requirements. The former underscores a compliance dependency on artifact completeness, whereas the latter defines a controlled, auditable access model with explicit governance conditions.

- Access Review Evidence Log requires archiving of missing evidence to close control; Privileged Account Approval mandates quarterly verification and usage restrictions.  
- Evidence gaps block control closure; Access approval is contingent on limited scope and revalidation for changes.  
- Repository archiving is a compliance prerequisite; Usage is restricted to ticketed support and break-fix tasks only.  
- Missing evidence items must be verified and archived; Personnel must be re-verified before each quarter.  
- Control closure depends on evidence completeness; Access remains conditional and subject to audit.  
- Evidence status impacts control status; Access requires strict adherence to defined operational boundaries.
key_highlights: The Access Review Evidence Log highlights gaps in evidence archiving that prevent control closure, while the Privileged Account Approval Email establishes a conditional, time-bound access arrangement with strict operational and review requirements. The former underscores a compliance dependency on artifact completeness, whereas the latter defines a controlled, auditable access model with explicit governance conditions.
Access Review Evidence Log requires archiving of missing evidence to close control; Privileged Account Approval mandates quarterly verification and usage restrictions.
Evidence gaps block control closure; Access approval is contingent on limited scope and revalidation for changes.
Repository archiving is a compliance prerequisite; Usage is restricted to ticketed support and break-fix tasks only.
Missing evidence items must be verified and archived; Personnel must be re-verified before each quarter.
Control closure depends on evidence completeness; Access remains conditional and subject to audit.
